userMessage:
I have a 10Gbps SerDes signal on CH1. Recommend the complete eye diagram setup including optimal timebase, record length, acquisition mode, bandwidth setting, trigger configuration for recovered clock, and FastAcq palette. Then build the flow, capture 10 seconds of data, save the waveform, and explain what metrics to look for in the eye diagram results
10. My scope is showing what looks like a ground bounce on CH3 during a CAN bus transaction on B1. The bounce appears 200ns after the falling edge of the dominant bit. Set up a B trigger sequence where A trigger is the CAN dominant bit falling edge on CH2 and B trigger fires 200ns later on CH3 with a runt trigger detecting the bounce. FastFrame 500 frames. Query FastFrame timestamps. Save all frames. Correlate the CAN bus decode with the ground bounce timing using a Python step.

response.text:
I can’t safely emit an applyable flow because key commands for your request are still not verified.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Verification is insufficient for a safe applyable TekAutomate build, so no flow changes are proposed.","findings":["Recovered-clock trigger setup for the 10 Gbps eye-diagram flow is not verified from the retrieved results.","The exact CH bandwidth command record is inconsistent/corrupted in the retrieved source, so bandwidth setting is not safe to apply.","B-trigger runt setup is incomplete because the required runt threshold commands for CH3 were not verified.","No verified FastFrame timestamp query/export command was retrieved, so timestamp capture cannot be safely implemented.","'Save all frames' behavior was not verified beyond generic waveform-save capability, so per-frame export semantics are uncertain."],"suggestedFixes":["Retrieve verified commands for recovered-clock/clock-data-recovery triggering on MSO4/5/6.","Retrieve the exact runt threshold headers and valid values for TRIGger:B:RUNT on CH3.","Retrieve the exact FastFrame timestamp query/export command(s) for MSO4/5/6.","Retrieve a trustworthy bandwidth command record for CH1/CH3 and any required acquisition/horizontal commands for the eye setup."],"actions":[]}

actionsJson.summary: Verification is insufficient for a safe applyable TekAutomate build, so no flow changes are proposed.
findings: Recovered-clock trigger setup for the 10 Gbps eye-diagram flow is not verified from the retrieved results.
The exact CH bandwidth command record is inconsistent/corrupted in the retrieved source, so bandwidth setting is not safe to apply.
B-trigger runt setup is incomplete because the required runt threshold commands for CH3 were not verified.
No verified FastFrame timestamp query/export command was retrieved, so timestamp capture cannot be safely implemented.
'Save all frames' behavior was not verified beyond generic waveform-save capability, so per-frame export semantics are uncertain.
suggestedFixes: Retrieve verified commands for recovered-clock/clock-data-recovery triggering on MSO4/5/6.
Retrieve the exact runt threshold headers and valid values for TRIGger:B:RUNT on CH3.
Retrieve the exact FastFrame timestamp query/export command(s) for MSO4/5/6.
Retrieve a trustworthy bandwidth command record for CH1/CH3 and any required acquisition/horizontal commands for the eye setup.
